title: Glowing Ores for KDCraft
description: My first try with emissive textures, for a texture pack I really like!
body: This is a small texture pack with glowing ores, intended for use with the pack [KDCraft](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/kdcraft)! I highly recommend the original texture pack! I just made this to play around with making emissive textures, and to add to my own world using that pack :)
